case_title: JELANI ANDERSON VS. SIMON P. ORCHOVER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. IF NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES, CASE WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE, (MEDIATION AGREEMENT). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY ORCHOVER, SIMON P. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ANDERSON, JELANI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, JELANI AS TO DEFENDANT ORCHOVER, SIMON P.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-22-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ORCHOVER, SIMON P.
COPYING FEES (9 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT ORCHOVER, SIMON P.

APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED.
